action.reasoning: Observation: local multi-slice validation now clearly ranks checkpoints, and checkpoints/best.pt is strongest by a useful margin (0.3408 local mean_r2 vs 0.3368 stacked and lower for others). The latest submitted model already improved back to 0.2973, but we have only 3 iterations left and no evidence that another retrain will beat the current best checkpoint. Analysis: the safest action is to submit the empirically best existing checkpoint immediately; if eval underperforms local ranking again, there is still one final iteration left to resubmit the runner-up. Decision: submit checkpoints/best.pt now with the current predict.py unchanged.
